root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.different_shareloan, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date ) as resign_date_tdate , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result , ( SELECT nvl(sum( sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance ),0) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_loan WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) ) as loan_bal , ( SELECT nvl(sum( sc_mem_m_resign_dep.dep_balance ),0) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_dep WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_dep.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) ) as dep_bal , sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_id , sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_qty, sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_value , (select resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code) as resign_cause_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id , (select branch_name from sc_com_m_branch where branch_id = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_br) as branch_name
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_share , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_resign_share.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.member_group_no and (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '01/04/2019' and '25/04/2019'

r_ktm_aero_member_req_resign_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0) and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0}
